summary: Ukrainian forces launched a kamikaze drone attack on the port area of Feodosia, Crimea, on April 19, 2026. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade used a ground unmanned system to evacuate a seriously wounded soldier from the 3rd Mechanized Battalion "Fireflies." The 35th Marine Brigade reported successful operations against Russian drones, while the KVN unit of Rosgvardia specialists destroyed a Russian Bogdan self-propelled artillery unit in Kharkiv region using night FPV drones. The "Rubicon" Center recorded over 24,000 enemy target destructions, with unmanned systems comprising 36.7% of destroyed targets. Russian forces captured a Ukrainian "Shark-M" fixed-wing drone near Krasny Liman after its parachute deployed during a kinetic intercept by an air defense drone.
